ddls:
CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file or directory */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the file or directory */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., application/zip, application/directory) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time the file was last modified */,
  "md5_checksum" TEXT /* MD5 checksum of the file for data integrity */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent directory, null for root directories */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the file */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the file was created */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Storage location of the file (e.g., cloud storage, local disk) */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the file is deleted or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directories" (
  "dir_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each directory */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the file ID in the files table */,
  "path" TEXT /* Full path of the directory */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the directory is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dir_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_directories_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a file */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the file ID in the files table */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the file */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "md5_checksum" TEXT /* MD5 checksum of the version for data integrity */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the versioned file */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Release notes for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_versions_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, guest) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of last login */,
  "password_expiration" TEXT /* Date and time when the user's password expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the file */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the file was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser or application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file the metadata belongs to */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag or label for the file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the file */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the metadata was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_metadata_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission applies to */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file or directory the permission applies to */,
  "read_access" INTEGER /* Read access granted (true/false) */,
  "write_access" INTEGER /* Write access granted (true/false) */,
  "execute_access" INTEGER /* Execute access granted (true/false) */,
  "granted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who granted the permission */,
  "granted_date" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was granted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file the integration belongs to */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the integrated tool */,
  "tool_url" TEXT /* URL of the integrated tool */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the integrated tool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)
